title: Meta AI chatbot enabled hackers to access others' Instagram accounts - BBC
summary_full: Meta AI chatbot enabled hackers to access others' Instagram accounts  BBCHackers Simply Asked Meta AI to Give Them Access to High-Profile Instagram Accounts.
